/usr/bin/g++ -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -O0 -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp-cicd-testing/lib/libBHV_SimpleWaypoint.dylib -install_name @rpath/libBHV_SimpleWaypoint.dylib CMakeFiles/BHV_SimpleWaypoint.dir/BHV_SimpleWaypoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BHV_SimpleWaypoint.dir/AOF_SimpleWaypoint.cpp.o   -L/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib -lhelmivp -lbehaviors -livpbuild -llogic -livpcore -lbhvutil -lmbutil -lgeometry -lm
